description: Semantic mapping for Oracle EBS Purchasing tables to business concepts.

tables.description: Stores header-level information for purchase orders, blanket agreements, and contracts.

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the PO header (Primary Key).

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: The purchase order number (user-visible PO number).

columns.name: TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Type of document: STANDARD, BLANKET, CONTRACT, PLANNED.

columns.name: STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: The status of the PO (e.g., APPROVED, INCOMPLETE, IN PROCESS).

columns.name: AUTHORIZATION_STATUS
columns.description: Approval status: APPROVED, IN PROCESS, INCOMPLETE, REJECTED, REQUIRES REAPPROVAL.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_SUPPLIERS (the supplier).

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL (the supplier site).

columns.name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.description: The currency of the purchase order (e.g., USD, EUR).

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date the PO was created.

columns.name: APPROVED_DATE
columns.description: Date the PO was approved.

columns.name: START_DATE
columns.description: Effective start date (used for blanket/contract agreements).

columns.name: END_DATE
columns.description: Effective end date (used for blanket/contract agreements).

columns.name: AMOUNT_LIMIT
columns.description: Maximum amount allowed for blanket agreements.

columns.name: COMMENTS
columns.description: Free-text comments or description for the PO.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User ID of the person who created the PO.

tables.description: Stores line-level details for purchase orders, including item, quantity, and price.

columns.name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the PO line (Primary Key).

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: LINE_NUM
columns.description: The line number on the purchase order.

columns.name: LINE_TYPE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINE_TYPES (e.g., Goods, Services).

columns.name: ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B (the purchased item, if item-based).

columns.name: ITEM_DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the item or service purchased.

columns.name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_CATEGORIES (purchasing category).

columns.name: UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Unit of measure for the line (e.g., EACH, KG).

columns.name: QUANTITY
columns.description: Total quantity ordered on this line.

columns.name: UNIT_PRICE
columns.description: Price per unit of the item.

columns.name: AMOUNT
columns.description: Total line amount (used for service/amount-based lines).

columns.name: QUANTITY_RECEIVED
columns.description: Total quantity received against this line.

columns.name: QUANTITY_BILLED
columns.description: Total quantity invoiced/billed against this line.

columns.name: CLOSED_CODE
columns.description: Closure status: OPEN, CLOSED, FINALLY CLOSED, CLOSED FOR RECEIVING, CLOSED FOR INVOICING.

tables.description: Stores shipment (delivery schedule) information for each PO line, including due dates and ship-to locations.

columns.name: LINE_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the shipment/schedule (Primary Key).

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINES_ALL.

columns.name: SHIPMENT_NUM
columns.description: The shipment line number.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The inventory organization where goods are to be received.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to HR_LOCATIONS (the specific delivery location).

columns.name: QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity scheduled for this shipment.

columns.name: QUANTITY_RECEIVED
columns.description: Quantity received against this shipment.

columns.name: QUANTITY_BILLED
columns.description: Quantity invoiced against this shipment.

columns.name: QUANTITY_ACCEPTED
columns.description: Quantity accepted after inspection.

columns.name: QUANTITY_REJECTED
columns.description: Quantity rejected after inspection.

columns.name: NEED_BY_DATE
columns.description: The date by which the goods or services are needed.

columns.name: PROMISED_DATE
columns.description: The date the supplier promised to deliver.

columns.name: PRICE_OVERRIDE
columns.description: Price override for this specific shipment (if different from line price).

columns.name: CLOSED_CODE
columns.description: Closure status for the shipment.

columns.name: MATCH_OPTION
columns.description: Indicates whether invoices are matched to PO (P) or Receipt (R).

tables.description: Stores accounting distribution information for PO shipments, including charge accounts and quantities.

columns.name: PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the distribution (Primary Key).

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINES_ALL.

columns.name: LINE_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.

columns.name: DISTRIBUTION_NUM
columns.description: The distribution line number.

columns.name: CODE_COMBINATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS (the charge account).

columns.name: QUANTITY_ORDERED
columns.description: Quantity allocated to this distribution.

columns.name: QUANTITY_DELIVERED
columns.description: Quantity received/delivered to this distribution.

columns.name: QUANTITY_BILLED
columns.description: Quantity billed/invoiced to this distribution.

columns.name: SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS.

columns.name: DEST_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Destination type: EXPENSE, INVENTORY, SHOP FLOOR.

columns.name: DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: The deliver-to location for this distribution.

tables.description: Stores header information for purchase requisitions (internal requests to procure goods or services).

columns.name: REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the requisition header (Primary Key).

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: The requisition number (user-visible).

columns.name: AUTHORIZATION_STATUS
columns.description: Approval status: APPROVED, IN PROCESS, INCOMPLETE, REJECTED.

columns.name: TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Type of requisition: PURCHASE or INTERNAL.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date the requisition was created.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description or purpose of the requisition.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

tables.description: Stores line-level details for purchase requisitions.

columns.name: REQUISITION_LINE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the requisition line (Primary Key).

columns.name: REQUISITION_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_REQUISITION_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: LINE_NUM
columns.description: The line number on the requisition.

columns.name: ITEM_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B.

columns.name: ITEM_DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Description of the item or service requested.

columns.name: UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Unit of measure.

columns.name: QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity requested.

columns.name: UNIT_PRICE
columns.description: Estimated or quoted unit price.

columns.name: NEED_BY_DATE
columns.description: Date by which the item is needed.

columns.name: DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Destination: EXPENSE, INVENTORY, SHOP FLOOR.

columns.name: DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: The organization that will receive the goods.

columns.name: LINE_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL (set when sourced to a PO).

columns.name: CLOSED_CODE
columns.description: Closure status: OPEN, CLOSED, CANCELLED.

tables.description: Stores header information for shipments received from suppliers.

columns.name: SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the receipt/shipment header (Primary Key).

columns.name: RECEIPT_NUM
columns.description: The receipt number (user-visible).

columns.name: RECEIPT_SOURCE_CODE
columns.description: Source of the receipt: VENDOR, INTERNAL ORDER, CUSTOMER.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_SUPPLIERS (the supplying vendor).

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_SUPPLIER_SITES_ALL.

columns.name: SHIPMENT_DATE
columns.description: Date the shipment was received.

columns.name: SHIPPED_DATE
columns.description: Date the supplier shipped the goods.

columns.name: SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: The delivery location.

columns.name: ORG_ID
columns.description: Operating unit identifier.

tables.description: Stores individual receiving transactions such as Receive, Deliver, Return to Vendor, and Correct.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the receiving transaction (Primary Key).

columns.name: SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.

columns.name: SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to RCV_SHIPMENT_LINES.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE
columns.description: Type: RECEIVE, DELIVER, RETURN TO VENDOR, TRANSFER, CORRECT.

columns.name: TRANSACTION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time the transaction was recorded.

columns.name: QUANTITY
columns.description: Quantity received or processed.

columns.name: UNIT_OF_MEASURE
columns.description: Unit of measure for the quantity.

columns.name: PO_HEADER_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_HEADERS_ALL.

columns.name: PO_LINE_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINES_ALL.

columns.name: PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL.

columns.name: DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE
columns.description: Where goods are destined: RECEIVING, INVENTORY, EXPENSE, SHOP FLOOR.

columns.name: SUBINVENTORY
columns.description: Target subinventory when delivering to inventory.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Inventory organization receiving the goods.

tables.description: Stores supplier (vendor) master information. Also accessible via PO_VENDORS view.

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the supplier (Primary Key).

columns.name: VENDOR_NAME
columns.description: The name of the supplier.

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: The supplier number.

columns.name: VENDOR_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
columns.description: Type of vendor (e.g., EMPLOYEE, VENDOR).

columns.name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if the supplier is active (Y/N).

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_ID
columns.description: Unique identifier for the supplier site (Primary Key).

columns.name: VENDOR_ID
columns.description: Foreign Key to AP_SUPPLIERS.

columns.name: VENDOR_SITE_CODE
columns.description: Short code name for the site (e.g., MAIN, HQ).

columns.name: ADDRESS_LINE1
columns.description: Address line 1.

columns.name: CITY
columns.description: City of the supplier site.

columns.name: COUNTRY
columns.description: Country code.

columns.name: PAY_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if this site is used for payments (Y/N).

columns.name: PURCHASING_SITE_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates if this site is used for purchasing (Y/N).

common_joins.description: Link PO Lines to PO Header
Link PO Shipments to PO Line
Link PO Distributions to PO Shipment
Link PO Header to Supplier Site
Link PO Line to Item Master
Link Receiving Transaction to PO Shipment
Link Receiving Transaction to Receiving Shipment Header
Link Requisition Lines to PO Shipment (sourced requisitions)

example_queries.description: Get all approved standard purchase orders with supplier name in the current operating unit.
example_queries.sql: SELECT ph.SEGMENT1 AS PO_NUMBER, s.VENDOR_NAME AS SUPPLIER, ph.CREATION_DATE, ph.CURRENCY_CODE FROM PO_HEADERS_ALL ph JOIN AP_SUPPLIERS s ON ph.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID WHERE ph.TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'STANDARD' AND ph.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND ph.ORG_ID = :org_id ORDER BY ph.CREATION_DATE DESC

example_queries.description: Get all open PO lines with quantities ordered and received to calculate outstanding quantity.
example_queries.sql: SELECT ph.SEGMENT1 AS PO_NUMBER, pl.LINE_NUM, pl.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, pl.QUANTITY AS QTY_ORDERED, pl.QUANTITY_RECEIVED AS QTY_RECEIVED, (pl.QUANTITY - pl.QUANTITY_RECEIVED) AS QTY_OUTSTANDING, pl.UNIT_PRICE FROM PO_LINES_ALL pl JOIN PO_HEADERS_ALL ph ON pl.PO_HEADER_ID = ph.PO_HEADER_ID WHERE pl.CLOSED_CODE = 'OPEN' AND ph.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND ph.ORG_ID = :org_id

example_queries.description: Find all PO shipments with a need-by date in the past that are still open (overdue deliveries).
example_queries.sql: SELECT ph.SEGMENT1 AS PO_NUMBER, s.VENDOR_NAME, pl.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, pll.NEED_BY_DATE, pll.QUANTITY - pll.QUANTITY_RECEIVED AS QTY_OUTSTANDING FROM PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL pll JOIN PO_LINES_ALL pl ON pll.PO_LINE_ID = pl.PO_LINE_ID JOIN PO_HEADERS_ALL ph ON pll.PO_HEADER_ID = ph.PO_HEADER_ID JOIN AP_SUPPLIERS s ON ph.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID WHERE pll.CLOSED_CODE = 'OPEN' AND pll.NEED_BY_DATE < SYSDATE AND pll.QUANTITY > pll.QUANTITY_RECEIVED AND ph.ORG_ID = :org_id ORDER BY pll.NEED_BY_DATE

example_queries.description: Get total PO spend by supplier for a given period.
example_queries.sql: SELECT s.VENDOR_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT ph.PO_HEADER_ID) AS NUM_POS, SUM(pl.QUANTITY * pl.UNIT_PRICE) AS TOTAL_SPEND, ph.CURRENCY_CODE FROM PO_HEADERS_ALL ph JOIN PO_LINES_ALL pl ON ph.PO_HEADER_ID = pl.PO_HEADER_ID JOIN AP_SUPPLIERS s ON ph.VENDOR_ID = s.VENDOR_ID WHERE ph.AUTHORIZATION_STATUS = 'APPROVED' AND ph.CREATION_DATE BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date AND ph.ORG_ID = :org_id GROUP BY s.VENDOR_NAME, ph.CURRENCY_CODE ORDER BY TOTAL_SPEND DESC

example_queries.description: Get receiving transactions for a specific purchase order.
example_queries.sql: SELECT rsh.RECEIPT_NUM, rt.TRANSACTION_DATE, rt.TRANSACTION_TYPE, pl.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, rt.QUANTITY, rt.UNIT_OF_MEASURE FROM RCV_TRANSACTIONS rt JOIN RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS rsh ON rt.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID = rsh.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID JOIN PO_LINES_ALL pl ON rt.PO_LINE_ID = pl.PO_LINE_ID JOIN PO_HEADERS_ALL ph ON rt.PO_HEADER_ID = ph.PO_HEADER_ID WHERE ph.SEGMENT1 = :po_number AND rt.TRANSACTION_TYPE = 'RECEIVE' ORDER BY rt.TRANSACTION_DATE
